<<I AM>> <<AT HOME>> <<WITH MY>> <<CUTE DOG>>  

1. <<THE MAXIMUM VELOCITY IS AT T = 3 SECONDS>> <<THE MAXIMUM VELOCITY IS 12 METRES PER SECOND>> <<THE DERIVATIVE OF THE VELOCITY FUNCTION IS THE ACCELERATION>> <<THE DERIVATIVE OF V(T) IS 3AT^2 - 2BT + CT>> <<THE DERIVATIVE AT T = 3 IS 3A(9) - 2B(9) + C(3) = 27A - 18B + 3C>> <<THE DERIVATIVE EQUALS ZERO AT MAXIMUM VELOCITY>> <<THE DERIVATIVE EQUALS ZERO AT T = 3>> <<THE EQUATION IS 27A - 18B + 3C = 0>> <<THE RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN A, B, AND C IS 9A - 6B + C = 0>>  

2. <<THE AVERAGE SPEED IS TOTAL DISTANCE COVERED DIVIDED BY TIME>> <<THE TOTAL DISTANCE COVERED IS THE INTEGRAL OF THE VELOCITY FUNCTION FROM T = 0 TO T = 5>> <<THE INTEGRAL OF V(T) IS THE INTEGRAL OF AT^3 - BT^2 + CT + D>> <<THE INTEGRAL FROM 0 TO 5 IS (A/4)(5^4) - (B/3)(5^3) + (C/2)(5^2) + D(5)>> <<THE AVERAGE SPEED IS THIS INTEGRAL DIVIDED BY 5>> <<THE AVERAGE SPEED IS (A/4)(625) - (B/3)(125) + (C/2)(25) + 5D ALL DIVIDED BY 5>> <<THE AVERAGE SPEED IS (625A)/4 - (125B)/3 + (25C)/2 + D>> <<THE AVERAGE SPEED IS W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W W
